description: Duffel provides travel-commerce infrastructure that lets businesses search, book, and manage flights, stays, and related travel products through a single platform. Its public documentation focuses on APIs for selling and managing travel bookings.
summary: Duffel exposes one authenticated HTTP API at https://api.duffel.com for flights, stays, cars, payments, notifications, and identity; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or first-party CLI was found on duffel.com.
